scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that concentration variable bounds are sourced from model.compound_bounds when present.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function uses compound-specific bounds from the model when available.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must access model.compound_bounds and apply the per-compound lower and upper bounds for xij variables.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Function hardcodes lower=-50 and upper=50 for all compounds, ignoring compound_bounds.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
prob, v, zi, dgri, xij, compounds = make_tmfa_problem(MetabolicModel(), Solver('glpk'))
print("Namespaces:", list(prob.namespaces.keys()))
print("Flux vars:", v.vars)
print("Binary vars:", zi.vars)
print("Gibbs vars:", dgri.vars)
print("Concentration vars:", xij.vars)
print("Compounds:", compounds)
result = {'prob': prob, 'v': v, 'zi': zi, 'dgri': dgri, 'xij': xij, 'compounds': compounds}
covered_requirements: Increase computational complexity by requiring the function to read compound-specific bounds from the model instead of using hardcoded defaults.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that when model lacks compound_bounds attribute, concentration variable bounds fall back to default (-50,50).
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify fallback to default bounds when compound_bounds is missing.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If the attribute does not exist or compound not in dictionary, use default (-50,50).
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Function raises error or uses incorrect bounds when compound_bounds missing.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
model_no_bounds = MetabolicModel()
del model_no_bounds.compound_bounds
solver = Solver('glpk')
covered_requirements: Increase computational complexity by requiring the function to read compound-specific bounds from the model instead of using hardcoded defaults.
